subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant of the Truth, Jinab-i-Tirandaz hath caused thy letter to soar until it reached the hands of this most humble [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق جناب تیرانداز نامه شما را پرواز داد تا بدست اینعبد پر عجز و
subcodes.subjects: @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
